name: enclo-cli
description: Self-hosted enclo CLI — npm workspace bundle (enclo-code + @enclo/core).

scripts.build: npm -w @enclo/core run build && npm -w enclo-code run build
scripts.test: npm -w @enclo/core run build && npm -w @enclo/core test && npm -w enclo-code test
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @enclo/core run build && npm -w @enclo/core run typecheck && npm -w enclo-code run typecheck
